# CWE-551: authorization checked on raw URL before path unescaping.
lang: go
file: CWE-551-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"strings"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func AdminGate(c *gin.Context) {
	raw := c.Request.URL.Path
	if !strings.HasPrefix(raw, "/admin") {
		c.AbortWithStatus(http.StatusForbidden)
		return
	}
	clean := strings.ReplaceAll(raw, "%2f", "/")
	c.Request.URL.Path = clean
	c.Next()
}
